Quarterly Performance Report

The following tables summarize our quarterly performance metrics across all product lines. Revenue grew steadily through the year while maintaining healthy profit margins. These results demonstrate the effectiveness of our strategic investments in infrastructure and talent acquisition.

Revenue by Quarter

Quarter Revenue Growth Profit Margin
Q1 2025$1.2M12%34%
Q2 2025$1.5M25%36%
Q3 2025$1.8M20%38%
Q4 2025$2.1M17%40%

Product Line Breakdown

Product Units Sold Revenue Customer Satisfaction
Widget Pro15,000$3.0M4.5/5
Widget Lite42,000$2.1M4.2/5
Widget Enterprise500$1.5M4.8/5

Overall, these metrics indicate strong momentum heading into the next fiscal year. The enterprise segment in particular shows promising growth potential with high customer satisfaction scores and expanding average deal sizes.
